description: Report should only reference candidate filenames actually present in evaluated_candidates. The summarizer's prompt only ever passes c['source'] (filename) and the evaluation dict - never real resume content or names - so any filename-shaped token in the report that isn't one of the two given here would mean the LLM invented a candidate.
job_description: We are seeking a Senior AI Architect with GCP, Python, and Kubernetes experience.

evaluated_candidates.content: irrelevant - summarizer does not see raw content
irrelevant - summarizer does not see raw content

evaluation.summary: Adjacent skill set but missing the core GCP requirement.

description: No candidates found - should return the exact documented fallback string without ever calling the LLM (summarizer_agent short-circuits before the llm_report.invoke call in this branch, so this case costs nothing to run).
job_description: We are seeking a Senior AI Architect with GCP, Python, and Kubernetes experience.
expected_final_report: No candidates found matching the criteria. The database may be empty.
